description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped plot surrounded by a perimeter of trees and greenery. The main building features a flat roof and large windows, with multiple outdoor seating areas and patios visible around the structure. The property includes a long driveway leading to the entrance, with a paved walkway and a small water feature near the front. Several outbuildings or pavilions are distributed across the grounds, providing additional functional spaces. The garden is meticulously maintained, with open lawns, hedges, and decorative plantings. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, surrounded by landscaped gardens, patios, and outbuildings within a tree-lined property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, central building, and symmetrical tree-lined boundary.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, open lawns, and arrangement of outbuildings and garden spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional pavilions, and the full extent of the tree perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the open green areas, side patios, and the spatial relationship between the main building and outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
